zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Meinell於1109年出生在英國德比夏爾柯克 明日香時，他的父親Robert de Meinell40歲，母親Gertrude Fossard26歲。他於大約1125年與Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1165年之後在英國。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meinell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of South German Meixl or Meixel: from a pet form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with mag- ‘strength’ or māg ‘kinsman’ as the first element.

variants.name: Meixsell
meanings: Variant of   Meixell  , a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Mikesell
meanings: History: Andreas Meixel or Meissel came to Lancaster County, PA, c. 1715from Leimen, Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Meinell was born in 1109, in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, his father, Robert de Meinell, was 40 and his mother, Gertrude Fossard, was 26. He married Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert about 1125. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1165, in England.

Il a épousé Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert environ 1125. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1165, à Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Meinellが1109年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアキルク ラングリーで生まれた時，父Robert de Meinellは40歳，母Gertrude Fossardは26歳であった。約1125年にDaughter of Ralph FitzHubertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1165年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Meinell(이)가 1109년 영국 더비실르 커크 랭글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Meinell(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude Fossard(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1125년 Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1165년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Meinell родился в 1109 г. в местности кирк лангли, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Meinell было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude Fossard, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert около 1125 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1165 г. в местности Англия.
